nodes.context: Crime syndicates composed of Fujianese people, active globally.
Fujianese crime syndicate active internationally, monopolized underground casinos in Tokyo.

nodes.standard_name: Grand Alliance for Safeguarding Hong Kong
nodes.original_text_name: Grand Alliance for Safeguarding Hong Kong
nodes.context: Radical pro-Beijing group in Hong Kong.

edges.evidence_quote: Hong Kong media reports indicated that the Fuqing Gang collaborated with the Japanese Yakuza, the American Mafia, and Triads operating in mainland China in the operation of underground casinos and the trafficking of illegal drugs in East Asia.
edges.context: Fuqing Gang collaborated with Yakuza in underground casinos and drug trafficking.
